zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell於1191年出生在英國達勒姆時，他的父親Eustace de Baliol23歲，母親Lady Petronella FitzPiers23歲。他與Cecily de Fontaines在英國英格蘭達勒姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1174年登記服兵役。他去世於1229年5月2日在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素享年38歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆蓋音福德。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell was born in 1191, in Durham, England, his father, Eustace de Baliol, was 23 and his mother, Lady Petronella FitzPiers, was 23. He married Cecily de Fontaines in Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1174. He died on 2 May 1229, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Gainford, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell est né en 1191, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, Eustace de Baliol, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Petronella FitzPiers, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Cecily de Fontaines à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1174. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1229, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Gainford, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell 1191 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustace de Baliol 23 und seine Mutter Lady Petronella FitzPiers 23. Er hat in Durham, England, United Kingdom Cecily de Fontaines geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1174 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 2. Mai 1229 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Barnard Castle, Durham, England und wurde in Gainford, Durham, England begraben.

Lui sposato Cecily de Fontaines nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1174. Morì il 2 maggio 1229, nel Barnard Castle, Durham, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Gainford, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywellが1191年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Eustace de Baliolは23歳，母Lady Petronella FitzPiersは23歳であった。イギリスイギリスダルハムでCecily de Fontainesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1174年に兵役登録をした。彼は1229年5月2日にイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルで38歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムガインフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell(이)가 1191년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustace de Baliol(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Petronella FitzPiers(은)는 23세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 Cecily de Fontaines(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1174년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1229년 5월 2일 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 게인퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell nasceu em 1191, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eustace de Baliol, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Petronella FitzPiers, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily de Fontaines em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1174. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1229, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Gainford, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Hugh de Balliol Of Bywell родился в 1191 г. в местности дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Eustace de Baliol было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Petronella FitzPiers, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily de Fontaines в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1174 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 2 мая 1229 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности геинфорд, дурам, Англия.

Se casó con Cecily de Fontaines en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1174. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1229, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Gainford, Durham, Inglaterra.
